calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Injunction For A Temporary Cease Action Until Civil Case Cgc-21-594404 Is Resolved
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Off Calendar

Petition 1. To Determine Validity Of Purported 2021 Trust 2. For Financial Elder Abuse For Payment Of Attorneys Fees For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: William Chong (pro per) appeared via zoom (petitioner).

The Court stated it will order the terminating of special administration and confirming letters of special administration has expired. Status on filing of dismissal, Petition to determine validity of purported 2021 trust and William Chong's petition to remove Albert Chong as successor etc., are ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Stauts On Filing Of Dismissal
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To (1) Remove Albert Chong As Successor Trustee Of The Shirley Chong 2016 Trust, (2) Order Any Successor Trustee To Comply With The Terms
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Off Calendar

Petition 1. To Determine Validity Of Purported 2021 Trust 2. For Financial Elder Abuse For Payment Of Attorneys Fees For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-22-305122 The Estate of Shirley S.M. Chong and PTR-22-305356 In the Matter of the Shirley Chong 2016 Trust.
Appearances: Michael Freedman appearing via zoom for Xue Chong and Albert Chong (petitioners).
Willam Chong appearing via zoom (pro per) (petitioner).

Both parties confirm the settlement. Mr. Freedman stated that he will be filing a dismissal by October 02, 2023, on the trust matter, that the Probate matter has no assets, and that the estate matter can be taken off calendar. The Notice of motion and motion for injunction set on September 20, 2023, at 2:00 p.m., in Dept. 204. Is ordered off calendar. Both Petition's for Probate of will and letters testamentary are ordered off calendar. William Chongs petition etc. and Petition to determine validity of purported 2021 trust are continued to September 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of dismissal is set for September 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bernardo. Not reported.

Petition To (1) Remove Albert Chong As Successor Trustee Of The Shirley Chong 2016 Trust, (2) Order Any Successor Trustee To Comply With The Terms
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Counsel Michael Freedman, And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Text Ruling

Petition To (1) Remove Albert Chong As Successor Trustee Of The Shirley Chong 2016 Trust, (2) Order Any Successor Trustee To Comply With The Terms
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Continued To Aug-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition 1. To Determine Validity Of Purported 2021 Trust 2. For Financial Elder Abuse For Payment Of Attorneys Fees For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Continued To Aug-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-22-305122 The estate of Shirley Chong and PTR-22-305356 In the matter of Shirley Chong 2016 trust.
Appearances: Michael Freedman appearing via zoom for Xue Chong (petitioner).
William Chong appearing via zoom pro per (Petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding examiners notes, that the remote appearance information must be attached to the De-121 form, that no proof of timely service of summons with a copy of the objection and contest 2021 will is on file, and that all parties are to refer to the examiners notes and address these issues before the next hearing date. All matters are continued to August 29, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To (1) Remove Albert Chong As Successor Trustee Of The Shirley Chong 2016 Trust, (2) Order Any Successor Trustee To Comply With The Terms
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition 1. To Determine Validity Of Purported 2021 Trust 2. For Financial Elder Abuse For Payment Of Attorneys Fees For Compensatory And Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-22-305122 Estate of Shirley S.M. Chong and
PTR-22-305356 The Shirley Chong 2016 Trust.

Appearances: Michael Freedman appeared by zoom for and with Albert Chong by zoom.

The court noted that William Chong is not present, that various motions are on calendar, and questions what will happen to the trial date if the cases are consolidated. Mr. Freedman stated that discovery has been conducted, that he thinks a jury is waived, that there has been no demand or jury deposit, and that the petition to invalidate the 2021 trust is really the critical issue. Mr. Freedman also stated that they also filed a will contest of the 2021 will, that once these issues are tried, whatever remains on the probate action will be remanded back to probate for the Probate Court to determine, and that if Albert and Jun prevail, that would end the matter. The Petition for Probate of (2014) Will and for Letters Testamentary, the Petition for Probate of (2021) Will and for Letters Testamentary, the Petition to Remove Albert Chong as Successor Trustee, etc., and the Petition to Determine Validity of Purported 2021 Trust, etc. are continued to July 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of a petition for appointment of guardian ad litem is off calendar as the minors' interests are already represented.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
